stories.title: Sinner vs Rublev — QF Record Day at Rome

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Sinner enters today's Rome QF vs Rublev at 31 consecutive M1000 wins — tied with Djokovic for the all-time record.

A win = sole history-maker AND his only missing Masters title.

Historic day at the Foro Italico. 🎾 #TennisRecap #ItalianOpen #Sinner #ATP

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
31 straight Masters wins for Sinner heading into Rome QF.

A win today = 32 and sole ownership of the greatest M1000 streak in history.

Career Golden Masters also on the line. 🏆 #TennisRecap #ItalianOpen #Sinner #ATP

article.headline: Sinner Chases Sole Masters Record in Rome Quarterfinal Against Rublev

image_concepts.label: Image 1B
text_overlay: None — featured image handled by WordPress

research.facts:
Sinner vs Rublev — QF Record Day
**Verified Facts:**
- [HIGH] Sinner def. Andrea Pellegrino 6-2, 6-3 in Rome R4 (R16) on May 12 — 31st consecutive M1000 win (Source: olympics.com headline "Sinner ties Novak Djokovic's all-time Masters 1000 win streak")
- [HIGH] 31 consecutive M1000 wins = ties Djokovic's all-time record (Source: atptour.com, olympics.com, ESPN — multiple independent sources)
- [HIGH] Sinner has won 8 of 9 M1000 titles; Rome is the only title missing (Career Golden Masters) — established fact from previous pipelines, confirmed ongoing
- [HIGH] QF opponent: Andrey Rublev, No. 12 seed (Source: atptour.com draws)
- [MEDIUM] Sinner leading 6-2 in Set 1 at time of writing (Source: single source — sky sport Italy live score; match in progress)
- [HIGH] Win would = 32nd consecutive M1000 win = sole all-time record
- [MEDIUM] Sinner H2H advantage over Rublev: leads heavily (exact record not independently verified in this session, but well-established; prior pipelines cited 7-3)
**Notes:** Match in progress. Write as preview/day-of coverage with record stakes clearly framed. Do NOT report final score as confirmed.

stories.title: Svitolina Shocks Rybakina — Saves 16 Break Points in Rome QF

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Svitolina saved 16 break points to upset No. 2 seed Rybakina in Rome — into her first SF at the Foro Italico since winning the title in 2018.

The veterans are refusing to go quietly. 🎾 #TennisRecap #ItalianOpen #WTA #Svitolina

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
16 break points saved. No. 2 seed Rybakina beaten. First Rome SF since 2018.

Svitolina didn't just beat Rybakina — she outfought her.

The Ukrainian veteran is back. #TennisRecap #ItalianOpen #Svitolina #WTA

article.headline: Svitolina Saves 16 Break Points, Upsets Rybakina to Reach First Rome Semifinal Since 2018

- [MEDIUM] Score: 2-6, 6-4, 6-4 in 2h23m (Source: AI summary of wtatennis.com; single source for exact score — use with care)

stories.title: WTA Rome SF Day — Swiatek vs Svitolina + Gauff vs Cirstea

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Thursday's WTA Rome SFs: Swiatek vs Svitolina + Gauff vs Cirstea.

Two former Rome champions, two defending Grand Slam legends, and a 36-year-old in her first career SF.

Roland Garros is 10 days away. 🎾 #TennisRecap #ItalianOpen #WTA #RolandGarros

article.headline: WTA Rome Semifinal Day: Four Champions, Two Matches, Ten Days to Roland Garros

stories.title: Darderi Def. Jodar, Ruud Advances — ATP QF Results

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Darderi def. Jodar 6-7, 7-5, 6-0 in a Rome QF for the ages — played through a smoke suspension from the Coppa Italia final, then bageled the third.

Ruud also beat Khachanov 6-1, 1-6, 6-2. ATP SFs set. #TennisRecap #ItalianOpen #ATP

article.headline: Darderi Survives Smoke Suspension, Bagels Jodar in Third; Ruud Also Advances in Rome QF

research.facts:
Darderi def. Jodar, Ruud advances
**Verified Facts:**
- [HIGH] Darderi def. Jodar (Source: atptour.com headline "Luciano Darderi claws past Rafael Jodar in memorable Rome QF rumble"; tennisuptodate.com roundup)
- [HIGH] Score: 6-7, 7-5, 6-0 (Source: atptour.com article + multiple roundup sources — confirmed)
- [HIGH] Match suspended: smoke from Coppa Italia final drifted over Campo Centrale (Source: atptour.com headline "Rafael Jodar-Luciano Darderi Rome QF temporarily suspended by smoke; Play has resumed")
- [HIGH] Ruud def. Khachanov 6-1, 1-6, 6-2 (Source: tennisuptodate.com, yardbarker.com roundup headlines — both confirm score and result)
- [HIGH] Darderi and Ruud into ATP SF (confirmed)
- [HIGH] Darderi previously defeated Zverev (No. 2) in R4, confirmed prior pipeline May 13
- [HIGH] Jodar (19) youngest Rome QFer since Djokovic 2007 — confirmed prior pipeline May 13
- [MEDIUM] Darderi is Italian-Argentinian (23 years old) — well-known fact but not independently verified this session

stories.title: Roland Garros 2026 — 10 Days Out, Qualifying Starts May 18

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Roland Garros qualifying starts Sunday. Main draw May 24.

Sinner on a 31-match Masters winning streak. Swiatek in form. Wawrinka and Monfils get wild card farewells.

The clay Grand Slam is almost here. 🎾 #TennisRecap #RolandGarros #Tennis #ATP
